taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Python Developer
core_skills: Python, Java SpringBoot, React.js, Relational databases, NoSQL databases
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, Java SpringBoot:1.0, React.js:1.0, Relational databases:1.0, NoSQL databases:1.0
must_have_quals: Strong proficiency in Python for backend development, Experience with Java SpringBoot framework, Frontend development skills with React.js, Experience with relational and NoSQL databases, Hands-on experience with microservices architecture, Knowledge of CI/CD tools like Jenkins, GitLab CI, or CircleCI, Strong understanding of RESTful API design and implementation, Basic knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP), Familiarity with containerization and orchestration tools like Docker and Kubernetes, Good understanding of agile methodologies and version control (Git)
preferred_quals: Experience with AI/ML integration, NLP, or large language models, Knowledge of SQL translation and agent development, Understanding of modern frontend build tools and state management, Experience with testing frameworks and automation
core_responsibilities: Develop and maintain robust web applications using Python, React.js, and Java SpringBoot, Design and implement RESTful APIs to support frontend components and third-party integrations, Build and optimize databases, ensuring data integrity and performance, Architect and develop microservices-based solutions for scalability and flexibility, Collaborate with product managers, UI/UX designers, and other developers to deliver high-quality features, Implement CI/CD pipelines to automate testing, deployment, and monitoring, Participate in code reviews, troubleshoot issues, and continuously improve code quality, Maintain documentation for system architecture, APIs, and processes, Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry best practices
job_summary: Synechron is a global consulting firm that leverages digital solutions to transform businesses. They are seeking a talented and experienced Python Fullstack Engineer to design, develop, and maintain end-to-end web applications, ensuring seamless integration between frontend and backend components.
